name: Refloor
description: Refloor is a highly-rated flooring company known for its exceptional customer service and expert installation. With a range of flooring options and a commitment to quality, they offer fast installation services, often as quick as the next day.

name: Real Floors
description: Real Floors specializes in flooring solutions, offering a range of installation services including carpet, vinyl, ceramic tile, and wood. With over three decades of experience, they are committed to exceptional customer service and aim to be a trusted provider in the flooring industry.

name: Flooring Resources Corporation
description: Flooring Resources is dedicated to meeting all your flooring needs, emphasizing a client-first approach since its establishment in 1992. Their commitment to staying current with industry developments ensures they can provide comprehensive flooring installation services.

name: Continental Flooring Company
description: The company specializes in providing various flooring solutions to federal and state governmental agencies, including military installations and educational institutions. With a commitment to customer satisfaction and efficient global distribution, they offer comprehensive flooring installation services.

name: FlooringMaster
description: FlooringMaster specializes in the sales and installation of high-quality flooring options, including hardwood, laminate, tile, and carpet. The company emphasizes expert project management and personalized service, ensuring timely and budget-friendly completions for flooring projects.

name: StarFloors
description: StarFloors offers extensive flooring expertise and a unique shop-at-home experience, making it easy to explore new flooring options and request estimates for your installation project.

name: Flooring Providers
description: Flooring Providers, a leading commercial flooring distributor in Ireland, specializes in high-quality flooring solutions, including carpet, luxury vinyl tiles, and wood, making them well-equipped to handle various flooring installation projects across multiple sectors. Their collaboration with top manufacturers and commitment to exceptional service ensures that clients receive tailored products and project support.

name: SEAMLESS FLOORING
description: Seamless Flooring offers superior flooring solutions specifically designed for the apartment and multifamily housing industry, emphasizing quality and durability for transformations in units, renovations, and clubhouses.

name: The Installers
description: TheInstallers specializes in a variety of flooring installation services, including wooden, vinyl, and carpet flooring. With over 10 years of experience, they prioritize client satisfaction and offer expert installation for both home and corporate spaces.

name: Preferred Flooring
description: Preferred Flooring emphasizes its expertise in flooring installation, highlighting a commitment to meticulous practices and professionalism. With a focus on creating functional and visually appealing spaces, they provide comprehensive support throughout the installation process, making them a reliable choice for commercial flooring projects.
